seedanceSegments.title: Lemon zest brown butter hook
seedanceSegments.description: Zest curl into foaming brown butter, garlic bloom, lemon juice hiss payoff.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @InductionCloseup as the active macro cooking view. Use @InductionWide to preserve induction plate geometry if the shot widens. Use @SaucepanLarge only as skillet or saucepan silhouette. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, seductive macro texture-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only zest scrape, butter bubble pops, garlic sizzle, juice hiss, steam rush. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s micro-planed lemon zest curl falls toward foaming brown butter; 0.8-1.7s amber foam rises with nutty specks (payoff to zest); 1.7-2.5s minced garlic scatters and turns fragrant gold without char; 2.5-3.4s induction context with terrazzo edge; 3.4-5.0s lemon juice pours, sharp steam flash, glossy butter. Kitchen continuity lock: light terrazzo countertop, flush black induction, same cabinet layout. Global negatives: no ingredient lineup, no finished pasta plate, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music, no extra shots.

seedanceSegments.title: Roasted pistachio crunch prep
seedanceSegments.description: Dry-toast pistachios, rough chop, foreshadow scatter.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @InductionWide for dry skillet toasting. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for chop and crumb mound. Use @SaucepanLarge only if a pan rim is visible. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for hands. Use @RoastedPistachioCrumbFrame only as target roasted color and coarse chop scale. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only dry nut rattle, toasting crackle, knife chops, crumb rain. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s raw pistachios tumble in dry hot skillet; 1.0-2.0s nuts deepen green-gold with thin oily sheen; 2.0-3.0s rough chop into 3-6 mm fragments on board; 3.0-4.0s palm-sized crumb mound on terrazzo; 4.0-5.0s pinch falls toward bowl rim. Scale lock: crumb mound palm-sized, not mountain; pieces coarse not dust. Kitchen continuity lock: same terrazzo and induction. Global negatives: no burned black nuts, no pistachio butter paste, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Crispy caper breadcrumb
seedanceSegments.description: Fry capers into golden panko parmesan crumb, set aside.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @InductionWide and @InductionCloseup for skillet frying. Use @KitchenIslandDefault for crumb dish context. Use @SiliconeSpatula only as flexible turner for stirring crumb. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for hands. Use @CrispyCaperCrumbFrame only as golden crumb and frizzled caper target. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; caper pop, toast rustle, cheese melt scrape, crisp scoop. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s capers hit butter-oil shimmer; 1.0-2.2s panko toasts golden with thyme; 2.2-3.3s parmesan melts into sandy crisp clumps; 3.3-4.0s red pepper flake specks; 4.0-5.0s crumb in shallow dish, audible crunch. Plating quantity lock: about one loosely packed cup of crumb for later shower, not a mountain. Global negatives: no soggy grey crumb, no giant caper blobs, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Crumb portion stays one cup loose pack for assembly.
seedanceSegments.risk: Capers may balloon oversized; lock frizzled caper scale small.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: caper pop; toast rustle; cheese scrape; crisp scoop

seedanceSegments.title: Orecchiette al dente
seedanceSegments.description: Boil, cup geometry, drain, reserve starchy water.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @InductionWide for boiling pot context. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for drain and measuring cup. Use @SaucepanLarge only as large pot silhouette. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for hands. Use @OrecchietteAlDenteFrame only as concave cup pasta topology, not spaghetti strands. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; boil splash, bubble chorus, drain rush, water pour. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s orecchiette cups fall into rolling boil; 1.0-2.2s cups slightly open, al dente satin firm; 2.2-3.3s colander drain with steam; 3.3-4.2s starchy water into measuring cup; 4.2-5.0s pot on induction wide context. Scale lock: each orecchiette cup about 2-2.5 cm wide, thumb-nail scale, not giant bowls or spaghetti. Negative: not spaghetti, not penne tubes, not mushy merged mass. Kitchen continuity lock: same terrazzo and induction. Global negatives: no spaghetti shape, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Orecchiette cup scale 2-2.5 cm carries through toss and hero.
seedanceSegments.risk: Seedance may morph cups into smooth spheres or spaghetti.

seedanceSegments.title: Lemon brown butter emulsion
seedanceSegments.description: Brown butter, garlic, lemon, starchy emulsion in pan.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @InductionCloseup for sauce macro. Use @InductionWide for pan context. Use @SaucepanLarge as pan silhouette. Use @Whisk only if a whisk is visible for emulsion swirl. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for hands. Use @LemonButterSauceFrame only as glossy yellow emulsion with zest flecks. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; butter foam, garlic sizzle, juice hiss, liquid swirl. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s butter foams to amber; 1.2-2.2s garlic turns fragrant gold; 2.2-3.5s zest and juice steam then glossy sauce; 3.5-4.8s starchy pasta water swirls milky-glossy; 4.8-6.0s pan held over induction context. Global negatives: no split greasy pool, no black garlic, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Seductive plate and burrata reveal
seedanceSegments.description: Toss, plate, burrata tear, caper and pistachio crunch, fork twirl food porn.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @InductionWide for toss. Use @KitchenIslandDefault for plating, burrata tear, overhead garnish falls, and fork twirl. Use @SiliconeSpatula for pasta fold. Use @CharacterSheet for visible hands. Use @GlossyOrecchietteTossFrame for sauced cup geometry. Use @BurrataTearFrame for 8-10 cm burrata tear and creamy spill. Use @CrispyCaperCrumbFrame for golden caper crumb shower texture. Use @RoastedPistachioCrumbFrame for green-gold pistachio crunch scatter. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; pasta coat, soft tear, crunch rain, fork scrape, sticky lift. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s orecchiette cups catch glossy sauce in pan; 1.2-2.3s silicone spatula fold until shiny; 2.3-3.4s pasta mounded in 24-26 cm shallow bowl; 3.4-4.8s burrata tear with creamy spill; 4.8-5.8s caper crumb shower; 5.8-6.7s pistachio scatter; 6.7-8.0s fork twirl with sauce thread. Scale lock: bowl 24-26 cm diameter, burrata ball 8-10 cm, one loosely packed cup caper crumb total, pistachio pieces 3-6 mm. Food-porn negatives: no mouth close-up, no flooding sauce, not oversized burrata, not miniature pasta. Global negatives: no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Final hero lock for outro
seedanceSegments.description: Basil and zest finish, then motionless hero bowl for FinalDishVisual handoff.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as active hero view. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for garnish falls. Use @FinalDishVisual only as intact final bowl state: 24-26 cm shallow bowl, glossy orecchiette cups, burrata dome intact and motionless, caper crumb and pistachio and basil visible, no fork inside bowl. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; soft leaf land, pepper crack, quiet steam, ambient hush. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.2s basil chiffonade falls; 1.2-2.2s lemon zest and pepper over hero; 2.2-4.0s bowl completely motionless on terrazzo, burrata intact; 4.0-5.0s slow push-in, steam wisps only; 5.0-6.0s wide kitchen context, bowl foreground static. Critical: no spoon dive, no burrata re-tear, no caper scatter after 2.2s, dish unchanged. Scale lock: same bowl and burrata scale as segment-06. Global negatives: no character touching dish, no food destruction, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.
